---
title: "Moving 'Sale'"
format: 
  html: 
    lightbox: true
---

We are downsizing to a new abode and have lots of items that just won't fit into the new location.  We would LOVE to give these away to someone else who can continue to make good use of them! 

Patti & Robin  ([plock@stlawu.edu](mailto:plock@stlawu.edu))


Click on any image to enlarge or scroll through them. 

::: {layout-ncol=3}

![L-shaped Bar This is a GORGEOUS full bar. Sadly, we are downsizing and can’t fit it.](graphics/Bar.jpg){group="row1"} 

![Desk/Art table - Large table/desk with storage underneath, some dings but can serve lots of purposes.](graphics/ArtTable.jpg){group="row1"} 

![~~Double Bed (with bookcase/headboard)~~ GONE](graphics/DoubleBed.jpg){group="row1"} 

![China Display Cabinet  -in great shape](graphics/China.jpg){group="row1"} 

![Refrigerator (with top freezer)](graphics/Fridge.jpg){group="row1"} 


![Lift Chair/Recliner - Chair plugs in and helps someone with mobility issues stand up. Originally expensive!  No longer needed](graphics/LiftChair.jpg){group="row1"} 

![Antique Sofa (with two matching chairs) Set was a wedding present to Patti’s grandparents in 1918! Amazingly, all three are in good shape and very comfortable!](graphics/Sofa1.jpg){group="row1"}


![Antique Chair 1](graphics/ChairGreen.jpg){group="row1"}

![~~Antique Chair 2~~ GONE](graphics/ChairRed.jpg){group="row1"}

![King Bed - Only 6 years old with infrequent use - in great shape](graphics/King.jpg){group="row1"} 

![~~Green Sofa~~ GONE- low profile, comfortable (matches green chair)](graphics/GreenSofa.jpg){group="row1"} 

![~~Green Chair~~ GONE](graphics/GreenRecliner.jpg){group="row1"} 

![~~Platform King Bed frame (Wood)~~ GONE - still in the original box - never used!](graphics/BedFrame.jpg){group="row1"} 


:::

We also have another double bed and a ~~twin bed~~ (each with mattress, box springs, and metal frame) and we'll have more to add in the future...
